title: kayea ferruginea
intro: Kayea ferruginea, also known as the rusty kayea, is a medicinal plant species belonging to the family Meliaceae. It is native to Southeast Asia and has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal activities. The health benefits of Kayea ferruginea include treating fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions such as eczema and acne, as well as being used as a natural remedy for digestive issues. Herbal preparations of Kayea ferruginea can be made into teas, infusions, or decoctions, and are often used in combination with other herbs to enhance their medicinal properties.
